# Video Poker Classic

> Play 120 free video poker games online. No download, no registration. Browser-based with optimal strategy guides.

## Site Overview

Video Poker Classic is a free-to-play video poker platform offering 120 game variants across 4 categories. All games run in the browser with no download or registration required. Each game includes a detailed strategy guide, probability analysis, and pay table reference.

## Game Categories

### Classic Video Poker (17 games)
Traditional draw poker with standard payouts. The foundation of video poker.
- Jacks or Better (9/6 Full Pay — 99.54% RTP)
- Tens or Better, Nines or Better, Kings or Better
- Multiple pay table variants (9/5, 8/6, 8/5, 7/5, 6/5)
- URL: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/category-classic.html

### Bonus Poker Games (52 games)
Enhanced payouts for specific four-of-a-kind hands. Higher variance, bigger potential wins.
- Bonus Poker, Double Bonus, Double Double Bonus
- Triple Bonus, Triple Double Bonus
- Aces and Faces, Aces and Eights, White Hot Aces
- All American Poker, Super Double Bonus
- URL: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/category-bonus.html

### Wild Card Games (35 games)
Games featuring wild cards that substitute for any card.
- Deuces Wild (Full Pay — 100.76% RTP)
- Bonus Deuces Wild, Loose Deuces Wild
- Sevens Wild, Threes Wild, Fours Wild
- Multiple regional variants (NSU, Downtown, Vegas Strip, etc.)
- URL: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/category-wild.html

### Joker Poker Games (16 games)
Games using a 53-card deck with one or two Jokers as wild cards.
- Joker Poker (Kings or Better — 100.64% RTP)
- Joker Poker Aces, Joker Poker Two Pair
- Double Joker Poker, Deuces and Joker Wild
- URL: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/category-joker.html

## Key Facts

- Total games: 120 video poker variants
- Price: Free (play money only, no real money gambling)
- Platform: Web browser (desktop and mobile)
- Technology: Pure static HTML/CSS/JS, no framework
- RTP range: 94.82% to 100.76% with optimal play
- Best RTP: Deuces Wild Full Pay (100.76%), Joker Poker Kings+ (100.64%), Double Bonus 10/6 (100.17%)
- Each game includes: interactive game, pay table, strategy guide, probability analysis

## Informational Resources

- How to Play Video Poker: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/how-to-play.html
- Video Poker Strategy Guide: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/strategy.html
- Odds & Probability Guide: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/odds.html
- Video Poker Glossary: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/glossary.html
- Frequently Asked Questions: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/faq.html

## Popular Games

| Game | RTP | Variance | URL |
|------|-----|----------|-----|
| Jacks or Better 9/6 | 99.54% | Low | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/jacks-or-better.html |
| Deuces Wild (Full Pay) | 100.76% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/deuces-wild.html |
| Double Bonus 10/6 | 100.17% | High | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/double-bonus-106.html |
| Joker Poker (Kings+) | 100.64% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/joker-poker.html |
| Bonus Poker 8/5 | 99.17% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/bonus-poker.html |
| Double Double Bonus 9/6 | 98.98% | Very High | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/double-double-bonus-poker.html |
| Triple Double Bonus 9/7 | 99.58% | Extreme | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/triple-double-bonus-poker.html |
| All American Poker | 100.72% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/all-american-poker.html |
| Aces and Faces | 99.26% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/aces-and-faces.html |
| NSU Deuces Wild | 99.73% | Medium | https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/games/nsu-deuces-wild.html |

- Homepage: https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/
- Sitemap (HTML): https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/sitemap.html
- Sitemap (XML): https://videopoker-web.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
